response.justification: Candidate brings broad full-stack experience across many languages and domains, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq matching the AI-native engineering context. However, Python is conspicuously absent from the skills list and employment history, which is a must-have for this role. Distributed systems experience exists (Sociomantic handled millions of req/s) but is dated, and there's no clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy leadership at scale despite the current title.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with AI agents, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Prior high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No demonstrated Python experience — a must-have skill missing from skills list and roles
Limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy, stakeholder coordination, or scaled decision-making
Distributed systems experience is several years old; recent roles focused on pricing/product work
